message:
chore(beads): track 4 new closed issues for arithmetic/bitwise differential tests and rustfmt compliance

Add issue entries:
- franken_numpy-43w6: 21 arithmetic edge case differential tests (floor_divide,
  remainder, power, division-by-zero, ldexp)
- franken_numpy-5dv8: 16 bitwise AND/OR/XOR cross-dtype and edge case tests
- franken_numpy-guex: rustfmt compliance restoration in ufunc_differential and dtype
- franken_numpy-wz32: wire orphaned fixture files into REQUIRED_FIXTURE_FILES contract
  (in progress)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
